description: Perform a log-log regression analysis to estimate the elasticity of tooth growth with respect to Vitamin C dosage using the dataset at /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/ToothGrowth.csv. Regress the natural log of 'len' (named 'ln_len') on the natural log of 'dose' (named 'ln_dose'). Save the analysis project to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/PowerLaw_Analysis.omv and record the resulting unstandardized regression slope for 'ln_dose' as a single numeric value in /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/elasticity_report.txt.
